svg.text: Gemini Live · Google ADK · Cloud Run · Firestore · Cloud Build
Owns audio pipeline · Greets · Routes requests
ADK App · EventsCompactionConfig(interval=20, overlap=3) — no 10-min session limit
ADK transcribes audio → routes to sub-agents as text context
Root model synthesises all speech · sub-agents call Firestore tools
gRPC streaming over HTTPS · RunConfig BIDI mode
